transitions.label: How the risk path forms
transitions.narration: So the first lesson is simple: do not design safety around perfect detection. Constrain the path from untrusted information to consequential capability. But once that path is visible, how do we decide which actions can proceed?

transitions.label: Classify the consequence
transitions.narration: In our story, searching and drafting are automatic. Booking the selected table and sharing the minimum contact detail require confirmation. Sending a home address or hidden profile to an unrelated public endpoint is blocked. The categories are clear; now they must be enforced by the system.

policy: No formal spoken chapter recap; story questions carry the viewer into the next module.
